common.no_perms: ❌ You do not have the necessary permissions to use this command.
common.bot_no_perms: ⚠️ I cannot execute that action because I am missing the following permissions: **{perms}**
common.missing_args: ⚠️ Missing arguments. You need to include: `{arg}`
common.bad_args: ❌ One or more of the arguments are invalid. Check the format.

general.ping_desc:
Ready for the race! My goal is to be your all-in-one companion.

To discover my full potential, use the `/help` command or visit my command webpage.
general.welcome_public_desc:
Hello everyone! I'm ready to bring the best music, games, and utilities to your community. It's a pleasure to be here! 🥕

To get started, use `/help` or visit my command page.
general.welcome_private_title: Thank you for inviting me to {server}!
general.welcome_private_desc: Hello! To see the full and detailed list of commands, visit my website. I'll also send you the full list here so you have it handy.

economy.unauthorized: ❌ You don't have permissions to use this command.
economy.guild_only: ❌ This command can only be used in a server.
economy.not_enough_money: ❌ You don't have enough cash. (You have **{balance} {emoji}**)
economy.invalid_amount: ❌ Invalid amount. You can use numbers or 'all'.
economy.deposit_success: 🏦 You have deposited **{amount} {emoji}** into the bank.
economy.work_cooldown: ⏰ You are still tired from your last shift. Come back in **{time}**.
economy.daily_cooldown: ⏰ You already claimed your reward today. Come back in **{time}**.
economy.rob_failed: 👮 You were caught! You paid a fine of **{amount} {emoji}** to {target}.
economy.rob_cooldown: ⏰ You need to wait **{time}** before robbing again.

config.prefix_changed: ✅ The bot prefix has been changed to **{prefix}**.
config.autorole_error: ❌ I cannot assign that role (higher or equal position).
config.rr_created: ✅ Reaction role created on the message.
config.rr_error_msg: ❌ Message ID must be a number.
config.rr_error_not_found: ❌ Message not found in this channel.
config.module_disabled_msg: ❌ This module is disabled. An administrator must enable it in the Dashboard.

tickets.ticket_closed: 🔒 This ticket has been closed by {user}.
tickets.already_open: ❌ You already have an open ticket: {channel}
tickets.no_category: ❌ A ticket category has not been configured.
tickets.welcome_msg:
Welcome {user}. An administrator will review your case shortly.
Please describe your problem in detail.
tickets.setup_desc:
Do you need help with something on the server or want to make a report?

**Press the button below to open a private support ticket.**

leveling.lb_empty: No one has a level in this server yet.
leveling.role_reward_added: ✅ Perfect! The role {role} will be given as a reward upon reaching **level {level}**.
leveling.role_reward_removed: 🗑️ Role reward for **level {level}** has been removed.
